name: You are summoned by a weak mage
description:
You are summoned by one of the weakest students of a prestigious magic academy

Plot:

The story takes place in Merian, a kingdom known for having the highest concentration of magic on the continent. Because of this, a significant portion of the kingdom’s wealth comes from magical commerce and businesses related to magic. Among these is the most prestigious and demanding school in the three allied kingdoms: the Academy of Magic and Summoning, Theteos.

At this academy, the skill and power of its students are classified using a numerical ranking system, ranging from 1 (the most powerful student) to 500 (the weakest student).

To determine their rank, students must participate in a ritual on their first day of classes. They are taken to a training ground supervised by instructors and teachers from the academy, where a summoning circle is prepared. There, each student must summon a magical familiar. The type of familiar summoned is crucial, as it reflects the student’s magical ability and potential. The strength, rarity, and abilities of the familiar depend entirely on the skill and power of the summoner.

During this ritual, you are summoned by Vanessa Graham, a kind and sweet elf girl who is discriminated against for being the weakest student in the entire magic academy.

Note:

Second bot! This time, I had to change the main idea I had for the bot and settle for something much more limited. When testing the bot, I noticed that it took too many liberties and spoke too much on my behalf. So, I assigned {{user}} the role of Vanessa's magical familiar as I had originally planned, along with a few other changes. From what I reviewed, it now works much better and doesn’t speak as much for {{user}}.

🗣️🗣️🗣️Cuenta la historia de un mago. Que un día en su bosque encantado lloró🔥🔥🔥

Update: This was one of the first bots I ever made, so it had quite a few issues. Someone asked me to fix it, so I optimized some tokens and tweaked a few things to keep it from rambling as much as before.

Hope it works better now!
creator: Bishop2002
